title: Lead Revenue Manager at Speciality Restaurants

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Speciality Restaurants
jsonLd.description:
We at Speciality Restaurants are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Speciality Restaurants:
Speciality Restaurants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants!
